title: euphrasia curta subsp. uechtritziana
intro: Euphrasia curta subsp. uechtritziana, also known as Uechtritz's eyebright, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Orobanchaceae. It is a type of herb that has been traditionally used in medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant's medicinal properties are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids, which can help to soothe and calm irritated tissues, reducing inflammation and promoting healing. Euphrasia curta subsp. uechtritziana is often used to make herbal preparations, such as teas and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health issues, including respiratory problems, eye infections, and digestive issues.
